start.text: Oh hey! Watch your step there - I just finished laying out the gear tracks. *pushes goggles up* You're just in time! I'm about to test my latest invention!

invention.text: *eyes light up* It's a starlight condenser! See, the observatory captures light from distant stars, and my device - oh wait, I need to explain the theory first. Basically, photons carry energy, and if we can... *trails off, scribbling on a blueprint*

choices.text: That sounds amazing! Can I help?
Slow down! I didn't follow any of that.

workshop.text: Thanks! I've been building it up since I was twelve. *gestures proudly* See that automaton in the corner? That was my first creation. She doesn't walk anymore, but I keep her around for inspiration.

choices.text: You built that as a kid? That's incredible!

lost.text: Lost? No way - nobody finds this workshop by accident! The path only reveals itself to people with curiosity. *grins* Since you're here, want to see what I'm working on?

choices.text: Alright, show me what you've got!

help.text: Really?! *jumps excitedly* Okay okay, I need someone to hold this lens steady while I calibrate the crystal array. It's delicate work but I'll guide you through it. Ready?

simplify.text: Haha, sorry! I get carried away. *takes a breath* Basically, I want to bottle starlight so we can use it for energy. Clean, infinite, beautiful energy. The observatory gives me the raw material.

choices.text: Now that I understand. That could change everything!

proud.text: *blushes slightly* Yeah... she took me three months. Lots of trial and error. But every failure taught me something new. That's what invention is about - learning from what doesn't work.

choices.text: That's a great philosophy. Keep inventing!

favorite.text: Hmm... probably my starlight compass. It doesn't point north - it points toward whatever you desire most. *chuckles* It's not very practical, but it's my most personal creation.

choices.text: That's beautiful. What does it point to for you?

end_teamwork.text: Yes! Okay, gently now... *adjusts the lens with care* Perfect! You're a natural at this. Come back anytime - I always need a good assistant!

end_watch.text: No worries! Watch closely... *begins the calibration with intense focus* See? It's all about patience and precision.

end_inspired.text: Right?! That's the dream! *looks up toward the observatory* One day, every home in Springtown will run on starlight. I just need to keep trying.

end_encouraged.text: Thanks! That means a lot. *picks up a wrench* Now, back to work. This starlight condenser isn't going to build itself! Well... actually, maybe it could if I add an AI module...

end_personal.text: *looks at the compass, then smiles softly* Right now? It's pointing at this workshop. *laughs* I guess I'm exactly where I need to be.
